subcodes.first_line: O friend! The One True Beloved proclaimeth: The whole world hath been created for the recognition of the Ancient Lord and this Message [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یاری حضرت یار یکتا میفرماید جمیع عالم از برای عرفان مالک قدم و این نبا
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @creation of the world, @compassion; kindness, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
